description: Add the reference station IU.CTAO (Charters Towers, Australia) to the SeisComP inventory using the StationXML file located at /home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/inventory/iu_ctao_station.xml. Fully register the station by converting the source to SeisComP XML format at /home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/inventory/iu_ctao_station.scml and importing it into the MySQL database (mysql://sysop:sysop@localhost/seiscomp). Ensure the station is visible in the inventory configuration at /home/ga/seiscomp/etc/inventory/iu_ctao_station.xml and enable the station binding by creating a key file at /home/ga/seiscomp/etc/key/station_IU_CTAO.
